headline: Jacobs Solutions Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) reported stronger fiscal second-quarter 2026 results, citing accelerating organic growth, higher margins, record backlog and momentum tied to data centers, advanced manufacturing and infrastructure markets. Chair and CEO Bob Pragada said adjusted earnings per share rose 22
